prose.calibration_contrast: Supporting honesty contrast: on genuinely-vague reads the LLM emits calibrated sub-1.0 disjunctions -- the fraction of reads at confidence exactly 1.0 is 0.00 in BOTH settings, versus the memorized it...

headline_structure_guidance: LEAD with the empirical-isolation / confidence-blindness result (FACT A + FACT B + the mixed-pool showdown), NOT with the closure mechanism.

CONCEDE the mechanism up front as INHERITED: the multi-hop deduction win is a standard neuro-symbolic premise (+0.673 of the gap is inherited closure; the novel empirical-isolation increment is +0.002...

Do NOT present the 2.8% certificate confident-wrong on CLUTRR absent pairs as the load-bearing number; it is structural-by-construction (disconnected components => sound closure abstains by definition...

evidence_tag_legend.REAL-LLM-READ: genuine OpenRouter LLM completion on real text
evidence_tag_legend.REAL-LLM-READ-ON-SYNTHETIC: genuine LLM read but on templated/symbolic substrate
evidence_tag_legend.NATURAL-CORPUS-PENDING: slot to be filled by the iter-7 Re-DocRED run

ledger_side_legend.NON_CIRCULAR: property of the raw LLM / signals, independent of the certificate (load-bearing)
ledger_side_legend.STRUCTURAL_BY_CONSTRUCTION: near-tautological given the disconnected-components setup; must not headline
ledger_side_legend.INHERITED: standard neuro-symbolic premise inherited from prior work
ledger_side_legend.NON_CIRCULAR_CONDITIONAL: certificate wins, interpretable only given FACT A + FACT B
ledger_side_legend.PENDING: to be filled by the natural-corpus run
